title: CONSTRUCT WHERE executes even if invalid
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE dataset (id VARCHAR(255) PRIMARY KEY, format VARCHAR(255), prefLabel VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO dataset (id, format, prefLabel) VALUES ('https://nkod.opendata.cz/zdroj/datová-sada/66268584/11', 'application/pdf', 'PDF Document');
INSERT INTO dataset (id, format, prefLabel) VALUES ('https://nkod.opendata.cz/zdroj/datová-sada/66268584/12', NULL, 'Unknown Format');
SELECT * FROM dataset WHERE format IS NULL;
SELECT id, format, prefLabel FROM dataset WHERE prefLabel LIKE 'PDF%';
key_bug_features: CONSTRUCT WHERE executes with OPTIONAL in invalid query
